name: Balls Crush Simulator
short_description: The only simulator where you can crush balls with fun and pleasure!
detailed_description:
Balls Crush Simulator is the best simulator game you have ever played. Your goal is simple. Take your hammer and destroy all these bad balls! Crush them into pieces with all power you have. Get rid of these nasty balls, sell debris and earn some cash. Buy various upgrades so that you can automate the process and destroy them even faster and more efficiently. Let these balls suffer!

MAXIMUM FUN

Crush balls into pieces, earn money, buy upgrades. Repeat over and over again until you are satisfied

MANAGEMENT

Choose upgrades wisely. Invest more funds into manual crushing or use powerful automation

LEVELS AND GOALS

Start with a single crushing room and end up with dozens of them. Each of them will provide you with passive income if you have the appropriate investments

Unlock all levels, buy all upgrades, create the most efficient balls crush production, unlock all achievements and the most importantly - have fun!
